{
  "name": "website",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "eslint"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@supabase/supabase-js": "^2.110.3",
    "framer-motion": "^12.42.2",
    "next": "16.2.10",
    "react": "19.2.4",
    "react-dom": "19.2.4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4",
    "@types/node": "^20",
    "@types/react": "^19",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19",
    "eslint": "^9",
    "eslint-config-next": "16.2.10",
    "tailwindcss": "^4",
    "typescript": "^5"
  }
}

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2017",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [
      {
        "name": "next"
      }
    ],
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": [
    "next-env.d.ts",
    "**/*.ts",
    "**/*.tsx",
    ".next/types/**/*.ts",
    ".next/dev/types/**/*.ts",
    "**/*.mts"
  ],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}

import { Metadata } from "next"; import { PageHero } from "@/components/PageHero"; import { Reveal } from "@/components/Reveal"; import { Eyebrow } from "@/components/Eyebrow"; import { Button } from "@/components/Button"; import { asset } from "@/lib/asset"; export const metadata: Metadata = { title: "About WAVE", description: "Not just an app — a way of living the night.", }; const VALUES = [ { title: "Curation", body: "Every event on WAVE is chosen, not submitted. We work directly with venues and promoters to bring only the nights worth your time.", }, { title: "Community", body: "Follow the artists and rooms you trust. See who's going. Build a night around people, not just a lineup.", }, { title: "Craft", body: "From the ticket in your pocket to the door you walk through, every detail is built to feel considered — never generic.", }, { title: "Discretion", body: "No spam, no noise, no endless feed. WAVE surfaces what matters and gets out of the way.", }, ]; export default function AboutPage() { return ( <>
Our story

Built on the Adriatic, launching from Split.

WAVE started with a simple frustration: the best nights in Split were always found through a friend, a story, a lucky scroll — never a platform built for them. Ticketing felt transactional. Discovery felt like noise.

We set out to build the opposite — a home for the city’s nightlife that feels as considered as the venues themselves. Every event curated. Every ticket a real pass. Every night, something unforgettable. WAVE is created and operated by Arvon Group Ltd.

{/* eslint-disable-next-line @next/next/no-img-element */}
What we stand for

Four things we never compromise on.

{VALUES.map((v, i) => (
0{i + 1}

{v.title}

{v.body}

 ))}
{/* eslint-disable-next-line @next/next/no-img-element */}

Come find your next night.
); }

import { Metadata } from "next"; import { PageHero } from "@/components/PageHero"; import { Reveal } from "@/components/Reveal"; import { Eyebrow } from "@/components/Eyebrow"; import { ContactForm } from "@/components/ContactForm"; export const metadata: Metadata = { title: "Contact — WAVE", description: "Get in touch with the WAVE team.", }; export default function ContactPage() { return ( <>
Get in touch

Questions, press, or just want to say hi?

General
hello@wave.app
Partnerships
partners@wave.app
Based in
Split, Croatia
Operated by
Arvon Group Ltd
); }

import { fetchUpcomingEvents, fetchVenues } from "@/lib/queries"; import { EventCard } from "@/components/EventCard"; import { VenueCard } from "@/components/VenueCard"; import { Reveal } from "@/components/Reveal"; import { Button } from "@/components/Button"; import { Eyebrow } from "@/components/Eyebrow"; import { Marquee } from "@/components/Marquee"; import { PhoneMock } from "@/components/PhoneMock"; import { asset } from "@/lib/asset"; export const revalidate = 60; export default async function Home() { const [events, venues] = await Promise.all([fetchUpcomingEvents(4), fetchVenues(3)]); return ( <> {/* HERO */}
{/* eslint-disable-next-line @next/next/no-img-element */}
Launching in Split, Croatia

Night comes
in waves.

A curated nightlife platform for the Adriatic’s best clubs, rooftop terraces, and sunrise sets — starting in Split, for people who chase the night.

{/* TONIGHT CURATED */}
Tonight, curated

Every night, something unforgettable.

{events.map((e, i) => ( ))}
{/* BRAND STATEMENT */}
{/* eslint-disable-next-line @next/next/no-img-element */}
Not just an app

A way of living the night.

WAVE brings together the city’s most respected venues, promoters, and artists into a single, considered experience — from discovery to the door. No noise, no spam. Just the nights worth showing up for.

{/* VENUES TEASER */}
Temples of the night

Where Split dances.

{venues.map((v, i) => ( ))}
{/* APP TEASER */}
The WAVE app

Your nights. Curated.

Discover tonight’s lineup, follow your favourite venues and artists, and carry every ticket as a scannable pass — all from one app.

{/* PARTNER STRIP */}
For venues & promoters

Bring your nights to WAVE.

Ticketing, guest lists, and an audience of people actively looking for their next night out — all in one partnership.

); }
